message:
bd-2q3f.2: add TransformStack and CGA transform module for SVG rendering

Implements CGA-based transform stack with:
- TransformStack in fm-core/cga.rs with push/pop operations using rotor composition
- Easy rotation extraction via rotation_angle() without matrix decomposition
- AffineMatrix2D.to_rotor() for matrix-to-rotor conversion
- CgaTransformStack wrapper in fm-render-svg with SVG-specific utilities
- 31 tests covering identity, translation, rotation, composition, and roundtrips

This is incremental progress toward full CGA rotor pipeline integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
